To be merciful and compassionate towards: To have inner peace and be a source of peace – not fear/stess – for others
To be truthful with yourself, and in your intentions, words, and actions. To avoid lying to yourself and others
To prioritize and give due time, attention, and support to family: parents, spouce, children, and next of kin
To embody modesty and cover the faults and flaws of others
To beautify your thoughts, hearts, words, actions, and relationships
To speak and act justly even if against yourself.
To give others from your time, wealth, knowledge, and experience (and expect nothing in return)
To seek excellence in thoughts, words, and actions by recognizing that Allah sees you even if you don't see him
To seek spiritual, physical, intellectual, and all forms of strength and use that for the sake of Allah, not to harm/opress others
To do what's right morally, ethically, and honestly in all situations
To consistently fulfill your promises, contracts, and trust on time and to the best of your ability
To be easy, down-to-earth and apporchable
To avoid excessiveness in all matters and seek the middle path
To be gentle in words and actions
To help and work well with others for the sake of a greater good
To take responsibility for your actions and not blame others
